subject: docs: theme chunk wrap-up — session notes, tests, TODO, CLAUDE.md
body:
- SESSION_NOTES.md: rewritten for the 2026-04-21 session (DaisyUI + theme
  module, safeStorage, pre-React chrome alignment, React-19 lint cleanup).
  Captures what's done, current state, and key context for the next
  session (no UI toggle yet, slate-* utilities pending Chunk 9, three-way
  duplication of theme defaults documented).
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: new "Theme" section with 6 scenarios before the Login
  Flow (first paint no-FOUC, stored preference persistence, cross-tab
  sync, OS fallback, iOS status bar, DebugPill observability). Regression
  checklist gains 6 theme-related items including a lint=0 gate.
- TODO.md: Chunk 8 (UI toggle), Chunk 9 (DaisyUI semantic-class migration),
  Chunk 10 (optional generate-theme-meta script). Places the theme roadmap
  above deployment items so it's visible in context.
- CLAUDE.md (Adopted Patterns → THEME_DARK_MODE): PWA manifest rationale,
  pre-React chrome mechanism, CSP caveat, three-place duplication note.
  New SAFE_STORAGE entry covers the shared utility + consumer list.

Tags: docs, session-notes, testing, pattern-docs
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
